safe_public_copy: Visiting medical-student access at Vanderbilt is governed by the Vanderbilt University School of Medicine visiting-students program. Applications are submitted via the AAMC Visiting Student Learning Opportunities (VSLO) portal between June and December. Applicants must be 4th-year medical students from accredited U.S. medical schools (LCME or AOA) with a passing Step 1/Step 2 or COMLEX score, BLS/ACLS training, and an affiliation agreement with Vanderbilt SOM. A non-refundable $180 processing fee applies.
audience_caveat: U.S. LCME / AOA medical students only — international / Caribbean / IMG not addressed by source
source_scope_caveat: System-level Vanderbilt SOM source — VUMC site placement not separately enumerated
visa_caveat: Not stated by source — do not claim sponsorship
application_caveat: VSLO via AAMC + affiliation agreement with Vanderbilt SOM
notes: Same school-level caveat shape as activated HUP / Northwestern in Slice 2

Eligibility: US medical and osteopathic students in good academic standing and actively progressing in their training.
